evals.prompt: How do I authenticate my domain in SendGrid for better deliverability?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on domain authentication setup for improved email deliverability

assertions.name: mentions_dkim_spf_cname
assertions.description: Mentions DKIM, SPF, or CNAME DNS records required for domain authentication

assertions.name: mentions_settings_navigation
assertions.description: Mentions navigating to Settings or Sender Authentication in the SendGrid dashboard

assertions.name: mentions_branded_links
assertions.description: Mentions branded links or link branding for consistent domain appearance in emails

evals.prompt: I need to set up a transactional email for order confirmations using SendGrid's API
evals.expected_output: Guidance on sending transactional email via the SendGrid Mail Send API

assertions.name: mentions_mail_send_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions the POST /v3/mail/send endpoint for sending email

assertions.name: mentions_dynamic_templates
assertions.description: Mentions dynamic templates with Handlebars syntax for personalized content

assertions.name: mentions_api_key_auth
assertions.description: Mentions API key authentication via Authorization Bearer header

evals.prompt: How do I configure SendGrid event webhooks to track email engagement?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on setting up event webhooks for email engagement tracking

assertions.name: mentions_webhook_url_setup
assertions.description: Mentions configuring a webhook URL in SendGrid Mail Settings or Event Webhook settings

assertions.name: mentions_event_types
assertions.description: Mentions event types such as delivered, open, click, or bounce

assertions.name: mentions_signed_webhook_verification
assertions.description: Mentions signed event webhooks or signature verification for security
